3107990.name: Convoluted Incident: Pinch me
3107990.description:
Convoluted Incident: Pinch me
is an adventure game with horror elements. You play as an ordinary guy who got into an accident and ended up in a mysterious house. He has to find a way out of the house and solve the mystery of this house.

You play as an ordinary guy, Mike, who was on his way to meet his beloved. On the way, he gets into an accident and when he comes to his senses, he finds himself in a house unknown to him. In this game you will have to explore a mysterious house, look for objects to get out, and also try to understand what is happening in this house, which is not as simple as it seems at first glance.

Key Features:
1)nice pixel graphics
2) Oppressive atmosphere
3) non-linear plot
4)Atmospheric soundtrack
